why_winner: Variant A earns the highest authenticity — 'I kept opening new tabs' is an immediately recognizable behavior for any developer and grounds the insight in a real moment rather than a declaration. The line 'I wasn't learning Gen AI. I was just consuming it.' is the sharpest statement of the core insight across all three variants. It also has the best pacing and white space of the three.

runner_up_notes.B: The two-use framing ('if you're starting' / 'if you're already building') is a strong structural device that Variant A lacks — the winner could borrow this to clarify the audience more explicitly.
runner_up_notes.C: The 'design decisions' framing with numbered points works well for the tactical audience; the line 'Those already exist and they're overwhelming for a reason' is a sharp closer that could be borrowed.
